summary.headline: ADM reports preliminary Q3 2024 results with mixed performance across segments and announces restatement of prior filings.
summary.narrative_summary: ADM announced preliminary third quarter 2024 financial results, showing net earnings of $18 million and adjusted net earnings of $530 million. The company reported a mixed performance across its segments, with Carbohydrate Solutions showing strong results while Ag Services and Oilseeds and Nutrition delivered below expectations. The company also disclosed plans to restate its fiscal year 2023 Form 10-K and subsequent Forms 10-Q due to errors in intersegment sales disclosures, though the restatements are not expected to materially impact consolidated results.

drivers: high utilization rates across the network
concerns: slower farmer selling in South America
higher logistics costs related to industry take-or-pay contracts
higher canola seed prices due to less supply in Europe
higher imports of used cooking oil and increased pre-treatment capacity in North America

drivers: strong starches and sweeteners volumes and margins
high utilization rates across the network
concerns: lower margins in the EMEA region

leadership_changes.name: Juan Luciano
leadership_changes.role: Chair of the Board and CEO

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Restatement of previously filed fiscal year 2023 Form 10-K and subsequent Forms 10-Q due to errors in intersegment sales disclosures.

extraction_notes: Numbers from Exhibit 99.1; cover sheet only had Item references. Some segment details were not fully quantified in the filing.
